positive: A stylized, symmetrical abstract representation of a cosmic journey through nebula and stardust. The primary focus is a central, glowing galactic core surrounded by sweeping, vibrant cosmic dust clouds in deep indigo, electric violet, and brilliant cyan. Incorporate minimalist geometric elements like constellations and arcs of light for structure. The style should be bioluminescent, elegant, and highly graphic, suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. High contrast, clean edges, flat graphic vectors mixed with soft gradients. Composition should be centered and balanced. Perfect for textile printing.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, blurry, noisy, lowres, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor quality, bokeh, grain, photographic, photorealism, cartoon, childish
